## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / enhancement
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Config / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is rebased on `main` (TBD — no merge commits)
- [ ] PR is small and focused (one concern per PR)
- [ ] Tests pass: `pnpm turbo test`
- [ ] Coverage stays at 100%
- [ ] Types check: `pnpm turbo typecheck`
- [ ] No lint errors: `pnpm turbo lint`
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies added (`http-client` is zero-dep)
- [ ] No secrets or PII in code or tests
